message:
Add TLS 1.3 support for HTTPS fetch

- Add wasi_tls.zig with minimal TLS 1.3 client implementation
- X25519 key exchange using Zig's std.crypto
- AES-128-GCM encryption using std.crypto.aead
- Update wasm_fetch.zig to use TLS for https:// URLs
- Automatic protocol selection based on URL scheme

Note: TLS handshake is simplified (no full certificate verification).
The async fetch requires QuickJS event loop integration for proper
promise resolution.
